description: We are looking for a Data Engineer. Requirements: 2+ years experience. Strong in Python, SQL. Experience with Apache Spark, Airflow, and Cloud Platforms (GCP BigQuery or AWS Redshift). Familiar with ETL/ELT pipelines and dbt.
Data Analyst needed. Requirements: Advanced SQL, Excel, and visualization tools like Tableau or Google Data Studio. Strong business acumen and presentation skills.
Data Scientist role. Requirements: Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch. Experience in building predictive models, machine learning algorithms, and A/B testing.
ML Engineer. Requirements: Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, FastAPI/Flask for model deployment. Experience with MLOps (MLflow), Docker, and Kubernetes.
Backend Engineer. Requirements: Strong in Go (Golang) or Python. Experience with REST APIs, gRPC, PostgreSQL/MySQL, Redis. Familiar with Docker, K8s, and microservices architecture.
Backend Developer (Java). Requirements: Java 11+, Spring Boot, Hibernate. Experience with RDBMS, message brokers (Kafka/RabbitMQ), and enterprise scale applications.
Node.js Backend Engineer. Requirements: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, Express/NestJS. MongoDB, PostgreSQL. Understanding of asynchronous programming and event-driven architecture.
Frontend Engineer. Requirements: JavaScript/TypeScript, React.js, Next.js. CSS/Tailwind, state management (Redux/Zustand), and REST/GraphQL API integration.
Vue.js Developer. Requirements: Vue.js 3, Nuxt.js, Vuex/Pinia. Strong HTML/CSS skills, experience with responsive design and modern frontend tooling.
Fullstack Engineer. Requirements: Node.js or Python backend, React or Vue frontend. Experience with cloud deployments, databases, and building end-to-end features.
Android Developer. Requirements: Kotlin, Android SDK, MVVM/MVI architecture, Coroutines, Jetpack Compose. Experience publishing apps to Play Store.
iOS Developer. Requirements: Swift, iOS SDK, SwiftUI or UIKit, CoreData. Experience with App Store deployment and CI/CD for mobile.
Flutter Developer. Requirements: Dart, Flutter framework. State management (Provider/Riverpod/Bloc). Experience with both iOS and Android deployment.
DevOps Engineer. Requirements: Linux administration, AWS/GCP, CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), Docker, Kubernetes.
SRE. Requirements: Strong scripting (Python/Bash), monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog), incident response, Kubernetes orchestration, SLI/SLO management.
Cloud Architect. Requirements: Deep expertise in AWS or GCP, cloud networking, security, scalable system design, cost optimization.
QA Engineer. Requirements: Manual testing, creating test cases, regression testing, Jira, API testing (Postman).
Software Development Engineer in Test. Requirements: Automation testing tools (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, Appium). Scripting in Python/JS/Java. CI/CD integration.
UI/UX Designer. Requirements: Figma, wireframing, prototyping, user research, understanding of Design Systems and mobile/web UX principles.
Product Manager. Requirements: Agile methodology, Jira, PRD writing, stakeholder management, basic understanding of tech and data.
Scrum Master. Requirements: Certified Scrum Master (CSM), experience facilitating Agile ceremonies, removing blockers, and coaching teams.
Cybersecurity Analyst. Requirements: SOC monitoring, threat intelligence, SIEM tools, incident response, network security.
Penetration Tester. Requirements: Ethical hacking, OWASP Top 10, Burp Suite, Kali Linux, vulnerability assessment, bug bounty experience.
DBA. Requirements: PostgreSQL/MySQL performance tuning, backups, replication, high availability, database security.
Blockchain Developer. Requirements: Solidity, Ethereum/Smart Contracts, Web3.js/Ethers.js, understanding of DeFi and consensus algorithms.
